Astro schema rejected seoDescription (~184 unicode chars vs max 160). Drafter self-validation does not enforce seoDescription length cap. MDX + sidecar uncommitted; pipeline-current.json preserved for resume; halt archive at .claude/state/halted/2026-05-02-ginger-seo-description-overflow/.

Phase 2 protocol: auto-fix DISABLED. URL re-verification: 12/12 pass (4 doa.go.th URLs require browser User-Agent — UA filter, not real failures). Content fidelity: spot-checked 5 of 12 sources via pdftotext+grep (CTAHR SCM-8, CTAHR CFS-GIN-3A, FAO Compendium, DOA OARD2 Ralstonia management, DOAE Agriman ginger fact sheet) — all primary claims match source verbatim. UF/IFAS EP638 verified via WebFetch (HTML). Medium issue: §11 line 357 conflates CTAHR CFS-GIN-3A two distinct fertilizer recs — 1:2:2 (10-20-20) ratio is correct for general commercial use, but the 300-500 lb/acre rate cited belongs to the 1:3:1 (10-30-10) OR 1:1:1 (14-14-14) preplant fertilizer in the same fact sheet. Minor issue: Bacillus subtilis dip duration phrased ambiguously between sections (§5 says 30 min seed-piece soak — verbatim match; §6.3 says monthly drench for 4 months — verbatim match; not a contradiction but worth noting that the Drafter merged two distinct OARD2 protocols into one paragraph which a reader could misread). Phase 2 deferral: maintainer to decide whether to fix §11 fertilizer-rate misattribution and/or split the §6.3 paragraph.

Fresh-context re-verification of maintainer §11 fertilizer-rate fix. URL re-verification: 12/12 pass (with browser UA on doa.go.th). Primary-source re-fetch via pdftotext: CFS-GIN-3A line 106-107 verbatim 'Commercial growers use a low-nitrogen fertilizer with a ratio of 1:2:2 (i.e., 10-20-20).' — MDX §11 line 357 now matches verbatim ('ใช้ปุ๋ยสูตรไนโตรเจนต่ำ อัตราส่วน 1:2:2 (เช่น 10-20-20) ตามแนวปฏิบัติของผู้ปลูกเชิงพาณิชย์'). The 300-500 lb/acre rate (which CFS-GIN-3A actually attaches to the 1:3:1/1:1:1 ratio in the separate 'Fertilizer' subsection) and the 'เป็นปุ๋ยรองพื้น' basal claim have been correctly removed; no new misattribution introduced. Spot-checked SCM-8 (45% 1993 loss, 14.9 lb/bag, 6.25 lb/sqft, 15-gallon bags, 3x8 ft benches, 10% bleach, Hepperly et al. 2004) — all match. OARD2 (BS-DOA 24 50g/20L 30min seed dip, 80:800 urea+lime, 14-month soil persistence, 10-12 month seed rhizome age) — all match. DOAE Agriman (45,700/14,300 baht, 6,000 kg/rai, 98,806 t / 1,980.5 MB export 2565, 3-year farmer/area/yield series) — all match. FAO Compendium (300k→600k tonnes 1980-1998, 5/5-7/8-9 month timing, 60-70% drying weight loss, 8-10% moisture, 10-12°C 28 weeks, $1.35→$0.81/kg) — all match. UF/IFAS EP638 (25-40% summer shade, 3-5 yr rotation, Pythium/Phytophthora/Ralstonia/Fusarium) — all match. Sidecar §11 rationale (cites 40,000 lb/acre yield, not fertilizer rate) remains consistent with §11 body after fix. SAFETY_POLICY: WarningBox at line 212-214 covers chemical guidance; biocontrol Bacillus subtilis dosage cited verbatim from Thai DOA extension publication (acceptable per SOURCE_POLICY §4 product-spec exception). SOURCE_POLICY: 12 sources, all 🟢 high or 🟡 medium with proper attribution, all linked. Frontmatter fields complete; seoDescription = 115 chars (within 160 cap). Minor informational note: §11 unit conversion 18,144 kg/acre → 7,257 kg/rai is rounded ~1.2% high (correct figure 7,174 kg/rai using 1 rai = 1600 m² / 1 acre = 4046.86 m²); within typical conversion tolerance, not a blocker or medium. Overall decision: PASS, no edits required, ready for commit.
